cat > ".gitignore" <<'EOF' # macOS .DS_Store .AppleDouble .LSOverride # Arduino build files build/ *.bin *.elf *.hex *.map # Processing generated files application.macosx/ application.windows*/ application.linux*/ output/ # IDE and editor settings .vscode/ .idea/ *.swp *.swo # Temporary and backup files *.tmp *.temp *.bak *~ # Logs *.log # Environment and secret files .env .env.* secrets.h credentials.h EOF
